hero.title: About School No. 10 named after Oybek in Karshi
hero.subtitle: A leading educational institution in Kashkadarya region, striving to educate well-rounded individuals

info.title: Bizning missiyamiz va vazifamiz
info.desc1: 1995-yilda tashkil etilgan Qarshi shahri 10-sonli Oybek nomidagi maktabi Qashqadaryo viloyatining yetakchi ta'lim muassasalaridan biriga aylandi. Maktabimiz buyuk o‘zbek shoiri va yozuvchisi Oybek nomini olishdan faxrlanadi.
info.desc2: Biz tanqidiy fikrlash, ijodkorlik va hamkorlikni rivojlantirishga ishonamiz. Bizning ahil jamoamiz o‘quvchilarning nafaqat akademik, balki ijtimoiy, hissiy va jismoniy jihatdan ham rivojlanishini ta’minlaydi.

info.title: General Information About the Curriculum
info.subtitle: Our curriculum meets the standards of the Ministry of Education of Uzbekistan and focuses on developing critical thinking, creativity, and global awareness

primary.title: Primary School (Grades 1-4)
primary.desc: Our primary program builds a strong foundation in literacy, numeracy, and critical thinking

middle.title: Middle School (Grades 5-9)
middle.desc: The middle school program develops deeper analytical skills and encourages students to explore their interests and talents

high.title: High School (Grades 10-11)
high.desc: Our high school program offers rigorous academic preparation and university-level readiness

gifted.desc: Advanced courses and personalized approach for high-achieving students

languages.desc: Learning English, Russian and other foreign languages with international certification opportunities

step3.desc: We will conduct an interview to learn more about your child

step4.title: 4. Admission Decision
step4.desc: We will notify you of the decision within 2 weeks after reviewing your application
